title: Stegra and thyssenkrupp Sign Multi-Year Deal for Non-Prime Steel Supply from Boden, Advancing Hydrogen-Based Green Steel Production
content: thyssenkrupp Materials Processing Europe has signed a multi-year agreement with Stegra for the supply of non-prime steel from Stegraâ€™s upcoming facility in Boden, Sweden. Deliveries will begin in 2027, with total tonnage in the high six-digit range. The partnership supports Stegraâ€™s ramp-up of large-scale operations and efforts to decarbonize steel production using green hydrogen and renewable electricity. While the steel purchased will not be COâ‚‚-reduced due to Environmental Attribute Certificates being sold separately, this collaboration strengthens the European non-prime steel market and promotes sustainable steelmaking practices.
author: Analysts Account
